reference: Hi. If you had sexual intercourse on the third day of your menstrual period, then there is no chance of pregnancy. Menstrual cycles can be delayed due to stress and even as a result of taking Primolut N. You need to wait for five more days. I think your period should come in these five days. Do not worry, as the pregnancy test results are also negative.
text: Hi. If you had sexual intercourse on the third day of your menstrual period, then there is no chance of pregnancy. Menstrual cycles can be delayed due to stress and even as a result of taking promethazine. You need to wait for five more days. I think your period should come in these five days. Do not worry, as the pregnancy test results are also negative.
